final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge-card illustration for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: single-panel educational knowledge card, cartoon storybook illustration style for children
Composition: large title at top, key bullet points listed clearly on the side, main scene showing the battle story in cartoon narrative form
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story — Zhou Yu's fire attack, Cao Cao's chained fleet, Zhuge Liang's wind prediction, the burning ships
Scene/backdrop: Yangtze River battle scene with ships, fire, and cliffside fortress in simplified cartoon style
Lighting/mood: bright and engaging, dramatic but not scary (child-friendly)
Color palette: warm reds and oranges for fire, cool blues for river, earthy tones for cliffs
Materials/textures: flat cartoon illustration with clean outlines, paper-card texture
Text (verbatim): 赤壁之战
Constraints: title must be prominent and readable, key points clearly listed with punctuation, story unfolds visually in cartoon sequence
Avoid: realistic violence, dark or frightening imagery, overly complex text layout
